title: Samsung’s Fold8 Ultra is its most ambitious yet
summary: Samsung confirmed that it’s finally using silicon carbon technology in the Fold 8 Ultra. Samsung’s “Now Nudge” proactive notification feature that suggests actions based on what’s on your screen has been optimized for the Fold 8 Ultra’s display.
caption: output/2026-07-22/samsung-s-fold8-ultra-is-its-most-ambitious-yet.txt
